title: galium firmum subsp. balearicum
intro: Galium firmum subsp. balearicum, also known as Balearic bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Balearic Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions, like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Galium firmum subsp. balearicum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
